private.name: ClearSpace
private.rationale: Same sector (Space & Aerospace), same stage (Series A), post-money $400M

data.narrative:
Reaction Dynamics is a Series A-stage space and aerospace company that has raised C$38M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a comparable universe of four private peers at the same or adjacent funding stage within the Space & Aerospace sector: Aalyria ($1.3B, Series B), ClearSpace ($400M, Series A), Hubble Network ($400M, Series B), and Sift ($274M, Series B).

The peer-median method is applicable and yields a $400M implied valuation, derived from the median of these four comps. The peer range spans $274M to $1.3B, reflecting heterogeneity in maturity and capital deployment. Public-comp anchoring via P/S multiples (median 53.2x across five Space & Aerospace tickers: RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) cannot be applied due to absence of target revenue disclosure, typical for private companies at this stage.

The triangulation supports a valuation range of $340M to $460M, centered on $400M. This range reflects reliance on a single applicable method with limited comparable data points at the exact stage. Key uncertainties include Reaction Dynamics' revenue trajectory, technology readiness level relative to peers, and whether the peer cohort adequately reflects the target's risk profile and market position within the fragmented aerospace sector.
